tasks.label: Publish: Alpha → Beta (develop → staging)
tasks.command: git checkout staging && git merge --no-ff develop -m "Publish tested changes" && git push origin staging && git checkout develop && echo Done: develop merged into staging and pushed.

tasks.label: Publish: Beta → Production (staging → main)
tasks.command: git checkout main && git merge --no-ff staging -m "Publish tested changes" && git push origin main && git checkout develop && echo Done: staging merged into main and pushed.
